overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), following a character ascending stairs and exploring a vibrant downtown district with neon-lit skyscrapers, a distinctive red torii gate, and moderate vehicle traffic. The clip showcases detailed urban architecture mixing modern glass towers with industrial scaffolding elements under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending to upper city level

events.description: begins ascending white concrete stairs from lower plaza level
continuing steady ascent, approaching top of stairway

agents.ego_description: following a bald man in a denim vest up the stairs, maintaining steady pace behind him

notable_agents.action: bald man in denim vest climbing stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide outdoor staircase with white concrete steps and solid railings on both sides
tall futuristic towers with neon signage and glass facades visible in the background
smooth white concrete railings flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person perspective following a character up a wide white concrete stairway in a futuristic city. The stairs ascend between solid railings toward an upper level, with towering cyberpunk skyscrapers and neon billboards visible against a partly cloudy sky in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza at top of stairs with street access

events.description: exits stairway into open pedestrian plaza with green buildings and street visible
character with purple mohawk walks past camera from right to left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza area, passing other pedestrians and approaching the street

notable_agents.action: person with purple mohawk and plaid shirt walking down the stairs past the camera

entered.detail: multi-story green building with distinctive X-shaped structural bracing and numerous air conditioning units
modern curved building with teal-blue facade and horizontal window strips
tall palm tree visible at the top of the stairs against the sky

segments.scene_description: After ascending the stairs, the scene opens into a sunlit pedestrian plaza. A distinctive green building with X-shaped scaffolding dominates the left side while a curved blue modern building appears on the right. A character with a purple mohawk passes by closely as the camera moves forward into the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with pedestrian walkway and vehicle traffic

events.description: camera pans upward to look at tall skyscrapers and neon signage above
silver sedan and other vehicles drive past on the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the towering buildings and observing the city traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street past the camera position

entered.detail: tall gray building covered with neon signage and advertisements including Japanese characters
ground floor commercial spaces with awnings and signage along the green building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a busy urban street, panning up to admire the towering skyscrapers adorned with bright neon signage. The green scaffolded building remains prominent on the left while vehicles pass by on the asphalt road. The perspective shifts to show the vertical scale of the futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching red torii gate with parked sports cars

events.description: approaching the distinctive red torii-style gate structure spanning the street ahead
camera moves closer to examine the parked red sports car on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the green pedestrian path toward the red gate, passing by parked vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in brown leather jacket standing near the red sports car looking at a device

entered.detail: large red traditional Japanese-style gate structure spanning across the street ahead
sleek red sports car with blue underglow and red wheels parked on the green pedestrian area
yellow sports car parked behind the red car near the industrial piping
large yellow industrial pipes and ductwork running along the right side building

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive red torii gate marking the entrance to a district. A shiny red sports car with custom wheels is parked prominently on the green pedestrian path. The blue curved building now appears on the left as the perspective shifts, with industrial pipes visible on the right side near the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk approaching the red gate

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street toward the gate
multiple vehicles including a blue sports car and white sedan pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street through moderate traffic, moving toward the intersection with the red gate

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt street surface
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track visible above the street beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the street, crossing the intersection through moderate traffic. Various futuristic vehicles pass by including a blue sports car and white sedan. The red torii gate grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches, with an overhead walkway bridge visible beyond it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a concrete stairway into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic downtown district. It begins by following a character up wide white stairs toward an upper level, with towering skyscrapers and billboards framing the partly cloudy sky. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a sunlit pedestrian plaza where a green building with X-shaped scaffolding and a curved blue structure flank the path. The perspective then shifts to pan upward, emphasizing the vertical scale of the architecture and neon signage before gliding along a busy street past flowing traffic. Finally, the camera moves through a city intersection and toward a prominent red torii gate, passing a parked red sports car and industrial piping before approaching an overhead walkway bridge.
